title: orca bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
* Thu Apr 03 2025 Lukas Tyrychtr <ltyrycht@redhat.com>
- Update to Orca 48.0 so we have the support for the a11y keyboard monitor
  Resolves: RHEL-83399
full_text:
